title: NTE US DVD vs Blu Ray differences
display_title: NTE US DVD vs Blu Ray differences
wikitext:
[]: NTE US DVD vs Blu Ray differences?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Sun Sep 30, 2018 7:42 pm So I read a while back that Giant God Monsters Invade Tokyo or whatever that short was called is included exclusively on the DVD version of Evangelion 3.33, and I know the DVD menu for 3.33 has music while the Blu Ray version is silent, so I was wondering if there are any other differences. Weebs, I call upon your help!

[]: Re: NTE US DVD vs Blu Ray differences?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Oct 01, 2018 5:17 am The extra short is not a DVD vs Blu-ray difference, but Japanese vs US release one; and the menu on my UK DVD is silent. I may check out other comparisons sometime, but no promises...

[]: Re: NTE US DVD vs Blu Ray differences?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Mon Oct 01, 2018 1:15 pm pwhodges wrote: The extra short is not a DVD vs Blu-ray difference, but Japanese vs US release one; and the menu on my UK DVD is silent. I may check out other comparisons sometime, but no promises...

[]: Re: NTE US DVD vs Blu Ray differences?             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Oct 02, 2018 2:39 pm I think the Giant God Warrior short wasn't published in any gaijin BD release of 3.33. The starry sky is silent in both my Italian BD copy and in my (supposedly) Japanese BDRip.
